step_rationale: Mitochondrial β-oxidation enzyme; ACADM deficiency impairs fatty-acid energy metabolism in ischemic myocardium.
mechanism: ACADM variants reduce fatty-acid β-oxidation capacity, compromising ATP supply and increasing cardiomyocyte ischemic injury during acute MI.

references.title: Transcriptomic and single-cell insights into mitochondrial genes NDUFA8, ECI2, and ACADM in acute myocardial infarction.
